remaining_params.SpellDescription: Untap up to one target creature and up to one target land.

params.SpellDescription: Reveal the top four cards of your library. You may put a creature card and/or a land card from among them into your hand. Put the rest into your graveyard.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Reveal the top four cards of your library. You may put a creature card and/or a land card from among them into your hand. Put the rest into your graveyard.

params.SpellDescription: You get an emblem with "Whenever a creature you control enters, you may have it fight target creature." Then create three 8/8 blue Octopus creature tokens.
params.Name: Emblem — Kiora, Master of the Depths
